title: Architecture Review Fast
summary: Run a shorter architecture review with parallel map and assess phases for faster first results.
author: COOLWHITE LLC

inputs.name: question
inputs.description: Architecture question or decision to review.

inputs.name: focus
inputs.description: Optional subsystem, risk area, or file path to emphasize.
inputs.default: the highest-risk runtime and operator paths

inputs.name: sourceContext
inputs.description: Optional JSONL source context file generated by scripts/source-context.js export.

inputs.name: sourceContextDigest
inputs.description: Optional digest or cache key for the supplied source context.

compatibility.notes: Opt-in fast architecture review app; the full architecture-review app remains unchanged.
